name: Cube Mission
short_description: Cube mission is a fun isometric action platforming puzzler. Travel through a floating world with all kinds of different obstacles and precarious puzzles. This journey can be enjoyed by anyone looking for an amusing, challenging and rewarding adventure.
detailed_description:
Get ready for a fun and challenging journey in Cube Mission! In this puzzle-platformer, you’ll guide your cube through tricky mazes, avoid deadly traps, and solve engaging puzzles. The gameplay mixes action platforming with thought-provoking challenges, making it easy to pick up and play. You'll have to outsmart enemy cubes, avoid spikes and flamethrowers, and use floating platforms, cranes, and elevators to navigate each level.

Control companion cubes and lead them to triggers, move crates to block lasers, and find the perfect path to your destination. With smooth controls, varied mechanics, and creative puzzles, Cube Mission keeps you engaged and entertained throughout. Whether you're stepping off platforms or dodging obstacles, this game promises a casual yet captivating experience for puzzle lovers.

Features:

  • Challenging puzzles: Mix of action platforming and puzzle-solving gameplay.

  • Companion cubes: Guide additional cubes to help unlock areas.

  • Varied mechanics: Use cranes, elevators, and crates to overcome obstacles.

  • Smooth controls: Easy to learn, engaging to master.

  • Avoid traps: Spikes, flamethrowers, and enemy cubes will test your reflexes.

  • Relaxing graphics: A visually appealing world to explore.

Jump in and test your puzzle-solving skills in Cube Mission!
